profiles.description: Minimal safe workflow baseline with lean Codex runtime and core MCP profile when applicable.
notes: This is the smallest supported baseline.
Risky MCP and plugin components remain excluded.

profiles.description: Core plus engineering knowledge packs, browser QA, release workflow, and exploration roles.
notes: Best default for engineering-heavy Codex installs.
Browser MCP expansion is considered explicit because the developer profile is opt-in.

profiles.description: Core plus security review workflows and security-oriented MCP additions.
notes: Use when the install is primarily for review, audit, and hardening work.

profiles.description: Core plus research knowledge packs, docs researcher role, and research MCP profile.
notes: Selecting this profile is treated as explicit opt-in for networked research capabilities.
